messages.text: A brutal kidney shot drops you helpless and reeling; the world whites out and you cannot act.
{name} crumples, stunned and helpless from a brutal kidney shot.
The paralysing shock of the kidney shot fades and your wits return.
{name} shakes off the kidney shot and recovers their footing.
{name} is stunned and helpless, crumpled from a brutal kidney shot.
